description_long: This is a single-carriage commuter train painted primarily in white with a blue lower stripe and gray roof. The train features a series of large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along both sides, allowing ample light into the passenger compartment. The undercarriage is detailed with visible mechanical components, including wheels, suspension, and electrical equipment. Both ends of the train have entry doors and windows, with one end showing more prominent headlight and coupling details. The roof is equipped with a raised central section, likely for ventilation or electrical systems. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for urban or suburban rail networks.
description: A white and blue single-car commuter train with large rectangular windows, detailed undercarriage, and entry doors at each end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the train, with large rectangular windows and a blue stripe along the bottom.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the train's headlights, entry door, and coupling mechanism.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing windows and blue lower stripe.
description_view_3: Rear view with visible rear windows, entry door, and rear coupling details.
